case_title: GARY HUEY VS. SEAN HANDRAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEY, GARY SERVED DEC-02-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HANDRAN, TIFFANY L."TRIXIE" VAN BUREN

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEY, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT HANDRAN, SEAN HANDRAN, T. L. TRIXIE VAN BUREN DOES 1 TO 10, IN OCCUPANCY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUEY, GARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANDRAN, SEAN HANDRAN, TIFFANY L."TRIXIE" VAN BUREN AND ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS, IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 1458 PACIFIC AVE, S.F. CA 94109. FURTHER JUDGMENT OF THIS COURT THAT PLTF RECOVER FR DEFTS SEAN HANDRAN, TIFFANY "TRIXIE" VAN BUREN HANDRAN: COSTS OF SUIT PURS TO MEMO OF COSTS; REASONABLE ATTYS' FEE TO BE DETERMINED BY NOTICED MOTION; COSTS OF ISSUANCE & ENFORCEMENT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION PURS TO CODE AND THE SHERIFF'S EVICTION FEE.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY OF KAREN Y. UCHIYAMA FOR FAIR RENTAL VALUE; AS TO DEFENDANT HANDRAN, SEAN HANDRAN, TIFFANY L."TRIXIE" VAN BUREN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HANDRAN, SEAN HANDRAN, TIFFANY L."TRIXIE" VAN BUREN
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF GARY HUEY IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT ENFORCING TERMS OF STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ( UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEY, GARY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEY, GARY SERVED DEC-02-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HANDRAN, SEAN
